heading: Details; administrative law judges
label: 3344 Details; administrative law judges
text: An agency as defined by which occasionally or temporarily is insufficiently staffed with administrative law judges appointed under may use administrative law judges selected by the Office of Personnel Management from and with the consent of other agencies.section 551 of this titlesection 3105 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large (4th sentence).5 U.S.C. 1010(4th sentence), .June 11, 1946, ch. 324, § 1160 Stat. 244Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.

Amendments1978— substituted “Office of Personnel Management” for “Civil Service Commission”.Pub. L. 95–454substituted references to administrative law judges for references to hearing examiners in section catchline and wherever appearing in text.Pub. L. 95–251
